processes.name: systemd
processes.rl_role: Linux system daemon/shell providing basic OS infrastructure, hardware polling, and environment capabilities.
processes.what_breaks: The operating system will become unstable or crash, taking Rocket League and Heroic Launcher down with it.

processes.name: kthreadd
processes.rl_role: Non-critical background system process or application running concurrently with your game session.
processes.what_breaks: No direct impact on Rocket League or Heroic, though reclaiming its RAM might slightly improve game performance.
